$statusLegend.ported: byte-equivalent to upstream (CI fails on drift)
$statusLegend.adapted: TypeScript port and/or namespace swap; logically equivalent
$statusLegend.extended: fork adds behavior on top of upstream
$statusLegend.added: file unique to the fork (no upstream)

files.notes: name + textdomain swapped to artisanpack namespace; attributes/supports/providesContext/allowedBlocks verbatim. `allowedBlocks` still lists `core/image` because inner image blocks remain core during Phase I2 — the image fork lands separately and will coexist via transforms.

TypeScript port of the upstream `GalleryEdit`. The shared `Caption` component from `block-library/src/utils/caption` is replaced by an inline `RichText` figcaption; `useToolsPanelDropdownMenuProps` is inlined from `block-library/src/utils/hooks` since neither is reachable via the package's `exports` field. Native (`Platform.isNative`) branches are dropped — this fork is web-only.
TypeScript port; behaviour byte-equivalent to upstream.
All seven deprecation entries (v1–v7) ported verbatim, including the `getHrefAndDestination`, `getImageBlock`, and `runV2Migration` helpers used by their `migrate` callbacks.

Upstream block-to-gallery, shortcode, and multi-file drop transforms preserved; the `switchToBlockType.transformedBlock` filters now match both `core/gallery` and `artisanpack/gallery`. Added bidirectional `core/gallery` ↔ `artisanpack/gallery` block transforms (forwarding `attributes` + `innerBlocks`).
Verbatim port of the link-destination + default-size constants.
`defaultColumnsNumber` and `pickRelevantMediaFiles` ported as TypeScript with explicit types; behaviour identical.
Verbatim port of the `BlockIcon` wrapper used by the edit-time `MediaPlaceholder`.

Ports `getHrefAndDestination` verbatim, then inlines `getUpdatedLinkTargetSettings`, `removeNewTabRel`, and `getImageSizeAttributes` from `block-library/src/image/utils.js` — and the `NEW_TAB_REL` constant from `image/constants.js` — because none of them are exposed via the package's `exports` field.
Direct TypeScript port using `@wordpress/data` + `@wordpress/core-data`. Behaviour identical.

Sass `@use` directives, `caption-style-theme()` mixin, `math.div`, `break-small`, and `custom-scrollbars-on-hover` mixins inlined as plain CSS. Per-column widths unrolled from the `@for` loop. `break-small` rewritten as `@media (min-width: 600px)`. The deprecated `.wp-block-gallery:not(.has-nested-images)` block is folded into this file so legacy markup keeps rendering.
Inline SVG mirroring the upstream `@wordpress/icons` `gallery` path.
Adapted to the visual-editor auto-discovery contract; upstream init.js / index.php server-side wiring is intentionally absent.

knownDivergences: edit.tsx replaces the shared `Caption` component (block-library/src/utils/caption) with an inline `RichText` figcaption. Practical impact: the toolbar caption-toggle affordance shipped by `Caption` is replaced by an always-rendered figcaption when the block is selected or the caption is non-empty.
edit.tsx inlines `useToolsPanelDropdownMenuProps` from block-library/src/utils/hooks. Practical impact: behavioural parity, but updates to upstream's offset must be back-ported manually.
edit.tsx drops the upstream `Platform.isNative` branches — the fork is web-only.

utils.ts inlines `getUpdatedLinkTargetSettings` + `getImageSizeAttributes` + `removeNewTabRel` + `NEW_TAB_REL` from block-library's image internals. Practical impact: behavioural parity, but the image-block upstream is responsible for keeping the new-tab rel scrub list in sync; manual back-port required if upstream changes it.
